creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Comment on attachment 184622
patch allow urllib3 1.22

This is confusing. files/patch-setup.py already has a header for an unrelated change. Maybe better treat backports as external patches e.g.,

PATCH_SITES=	https://github.com/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}/commit/
PATCHFILES=	8d1228cd1943.patch:-p1
